title: Blueprint Cake with Flickering Vertex Candles
spec: A multi-tiered low-poly cake is constructed using stacked, scaled cylinder meshes with distinct vertex indices to allow for procedural layer separation. The entire scene is rendered in a "Blueprint" style: a base dark blue background with geometry drawn via a custom shader that outlines edges using back-face culling and depth bias, combined with a wireframe overlay. Candles are instanced thin cyli
steering: spinning birthday cake with candles and fireworks in background
